rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEONARD B. CAMERON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: U.S. Bank Nat. Assoc. As Trustee Relating To Chevy Chase Funding Llc Mortgage Backed Securties Series 2006-2'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Third Cross-Complaint Re 195 Hampton Road.
rulings.Rulings: Motion is granted in light of the statement of non-opposition and without prejudice to any issues that may be raised with respect to the amended pleadings. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on 1/18/12.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEONARD B. CAMERON TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Deutsche Bank Natl. Trust Co., As Indentured Trustee For American Home Mortgage Investment Trust 2006-1'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Second Amended Cross-Complaint Re 12 Hillview Court
rulings.Rulings: Motion is granted in light of the statement of non-opposition and without prejudice to any issues that may be raised with respect to the amended pleadings. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on 1/18/12.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ESTHER R. KLIPPEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Strike Petition For Elder And Dependent Adult Financial Abuse
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained with 10 days leave to amend if petitioner can state facts supporting a claim that respondent took assets from Ms. Klippel prior to her death. No authority has been presented for the proposition that interference with testamentary intent, standing alone, constitutes elder abuse under the Elder Abuse Act. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on 1/18/12.
